channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [VAGHANI] Emrock Corp Board Meeting on 12/05/2026 for Audited Results
item.description:
Emrock Corporation Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 12, 2026, to consider and approve the standalone audited financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will take place at the company's registered office in Ahmedabad. The trading window has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Emrock Corp board meeting set for May 12, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve FY26 audited financial results.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026.
  • Trading window reopens 48 hours post result declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VAGHANI TECHNO-BUILD LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JAYATMA] Jayatma Enterprises Adopts Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Jayatma Enterprises Ltd. announced the adoption of standalone audited financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, during a Board of Directors meeting held on May 7, 2026. The results, along with the Independent Auditor’s Report from Shivam Soni & Co., have been approved and taken on record. The audit report has an unmodified opinion on the audited standalone financial results.

  • Standalone audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 adopted.
  • Board meeting held on May 7, 2026, to approve results.
  • Shivam Soni & Co. issued an audit report with an unmodified opinion.
  • Results are compliant with Regulation 33 of SEBI LODR 2015.
  • Nirav K. Shah, Chairman, declared the unmodified audit opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jayatma Enterprises Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [COROMANDEL] Coromandel Intl: Final Dividend of ₹2/Share Approved
item.description:
Coromandel International Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, and declared a final dividend of ₹2 per equity share. The dividend will be paid on or before August 21, 2026, with a record date of July 16, 2026. The 64th Annual General Meeting will be held on July 23, 2026. The re-appointment of M/s. S R Batliboi & Associates LLP as Statutory Auditors was also approved, subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, a corporate guarantee of up to USD 15.5 million was approved for Baobab Mining & Chemicals Corporation, Senegal.

  • Final dividend of ₹2 per equity share approved.
  • Record date for dividend is fixed as July 16, 2026.
  • 64th Annual General Meeting to be held on July 23, 2026.
  • Re-appointment of M/s. S R Batliboi & Associates LLP as Statutory Auditors approved.
  • Corporate guarantee of up to USD 15.5 million for Baobab Mining & Chemicals Corporation approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: COROMANDEL INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [OSWALPUMPS] Oswal Pumps' Subsidiary Forms Oswal Doon Baran Bundi Solar
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Oswal Pumps Ltd announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Oswal Solar Energy Private Limited, has incorporated a new subsidiary named "Oswal Doon Baran Bundi Solar Projects Limited" on May 06, 2026. This new entity will be a step-down subsidiary of Oswal Pumps. Oswal Solar and Doon Infrapower Projects Private Limited will hold 60% and 40% respectively of the paid-up equity share capital with an object to design, supply, erection, testing and commissioning including comprehensive operation and maintenance (O&M) for 25 years from the date of commissioning of Rooftop Solar (RTS) Photovoltaic Power Projects on State Government buildings/State Government undertaking buildings in Rajasthan under Hybrid Annuity Mode (HAM).

  • Oswal Solar Energy Pvt Ltd incorporates Oswal Doon Baran Bundi Solar Projects Limited.
  • Oswal Solar holds 60% stake in the new subsidiary with ₹60,000 investment.
  • The subsidiary will focus on rooftop solar projects in Rajasthan under HAM.
  • Authorised Share Capital of Oswal Doon Baran Bundi Solar Projects Limited is ₹10,00,000.
  • The new entity is yet to commence business operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Oswal Pumps Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [GATEWAY] Gateway Distriparks Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Gateway Distriparks Ltd's board approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The auditor's report by S.R. Batliboi & Co. LLP includes a qualified opinion related to regulatory proceedings involving Benami property and advances of ₹866.25 lakhs. The results will be published and available on the company website.

  • Gateway Distriparks approved audited financial results for FY26.
  • Auditor issued a qualified opinion on consolidated results.
  • Qualification relates to Benami property proceedings and advances of ₹866.25 lakhs.
  • Results will be published as per Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gateway Distriparks Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [HARSHA] Harsha Engineers: 16th AGM on July 23, 2026
item.description:
Harsha Engineers International Ltd will hold its 16th Annual General Meeting (AGM) on Thursday, July 23, 2026, via video conferencing. The board has recommended a final dividend of ₹1.5 per equity share. The record date for the AGM and dividend is July 9, 2026, and the book closure is from July 17 to July 23, 2026. The board also recommended the appointment of M/s Mukesh M. Shah & Co as statutory auditor.

  • 16th AGM to be held on July 23, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Final dividend of ₹1.5 per share recommended for FY26, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Record date for AGM and dividend fixed as July 9, 2026.
  • Book closure for AGM from July 17 to July 23, 2026.
  • M/s Mukesh M. Shah & Co recommended as new statutory auditor.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Harsha Engineers International Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [NILASPACES] Nila Spaces Appoints Internal and Cost Auditors for FY 2026-27
item.description:
Nila Spaces Ltd's board meeting on May 7, 2026, approved the appointment of M/s M P Doshi & Associates as Internal Auditor and M/s Dalwadi & Associates as Cost Auditor for the financial year 2026-27. The board also approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial statements and results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and appointed Mr. Prashant H Sarkhedi as Whole Time Director and Mr. Deep S Vadodaria as Chairman and Managing Director.

  • M/s M P Doshi & Associates appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • M/s Dalwadi & Associates appointed as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Mr. Prashant H Sarkhedi appointed as Whole Time Director.
  • Mr. Deep S Vadodaria appointed as Chairman and Managing Director.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nila Spaces Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [JAYATMA] Jayatma Enterprises Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Jayatma Enterprises Ltd's Board of Directors approved the standalone audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, as per Regulation 33 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The board meeting was held on May 7, 2026, and the auditors, Shivam Soni & Co., issued an audit report with an unmodified opinion on the financial results. The declaration was issued in compliance with Regulation 33(3)(d) of the SEBI regulations.

  • Jayatma Enterprises approved standalone audited financial results for FY26.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the audited financial results.
  • Meeting held on May 7, 2026, approved results as per SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jayatma Enterprises Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NILASPACES] Nila Spaces: Prashant Sarkhedi Appointed Whole Time Director
item.description:
Nila Spaces Ltd's board meeting on May 7, 2026, approved audited financial statements for FY26. Mr. Prashant H Sarkhedi was appointed as Whole Time Director. Mr. Deep S Vadodaria was appointed as Chairman and Managing Director. M/s M P Doshi & Associates were appointed as Internal Auditor, and M/s Dalwadi & Associates as Cost Auditor for FY27.

  • Prashant H Sarkhedi appointed as Whole Time Director.
  • Deep S Vadodaria appointed as Chairman and Managing Director.
  • M/s M P Doshi & Associates appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27.
  • M/s Dalwadi & Associates appointed as Cost Auditor for FY27.
  • Audited FY26 financial results approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nila Spaces Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [HARSHA] Harsha Engineers: AGM on July 23, 2026; Dividend Recommended
item.description:
Harsha Engineers International Ltd. announced the 16th Annual General Meeting (AGM) to be held on July 23, 2026, via video conferencing. A final dividend of ₹1.5 per equity share (15%) has been recommended, subject to shareholder approval. The record date for the AGM and dividend is July 9, 2026. The Register of Members and Share Transfer Books will be closed from July 17, 2026, to July 23, 2026, for the AGM. The board also recommended the appointment of M/s Mukesh M. Shah & Co as statutory auditor.

  • 16th AGM to be held on July 23, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Final dividend of ₹1.5 per share (15%) recommended, pending shareholder approval.
  • Record date for AGM and dividend fixed as July 9, 2026.
  • Book closure from July 17, 2026, to July 23, 2026, for AGM purposes.
  • M/s Mukesh M. Shah & Co recommended as new statutory auditor.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Harsha Engineers International Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM
